summary:
The latest method involves using a tool that employs piezoelectric technology during surgery to cut bones precisely while minimizing damage to nearby important structures including veins/nerves. This approach has been shown effective due its high level of control over incisions made into dense tissue types necessary for successful transplantation procedures involving large areas or intricate shapes within skeletal frameworks needing protection from trauma-induced complications post-operatively.
